sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ProShares S&P 500 High Income ETF Review and Aggregate Rating (ISPY)
feed.summary: MarketBeat has assigned a "Moderate Buy" aggregate rating to the ProShares S&P 500 High Income ETF (ISPY), with an aggregate price target of $45.12. This rating is based on 821 analyst ratings over the past year, covering 25 companies, which constitute 42.7% of the ETF's portfolio. The report details the consensus ratings and price targets for ISPY's top 25 holdings, including major companies like NVIDIA, Apple, Microsoft, and Amazon.

feed.title: Intelligent Group (Nasdaq:INTJ) - Stock Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides a stock analysis of Intelligent Group (INTJ), a company offering financial public relations services in Hong Kong. It highlights that the company has a market cap of US$10.8m, its earnings have declined by 58% per year over the past 5 years, and its stock is currently considered 376.9% overvalued with a fair value of US$1.47 compared to its current price of US$7.01. The report also details past performance, financial health, recent news, and shareholder returns, indicating underperformance relative to both the US Media industry and the broader US Market.

feed.title: The India Fund, Inc. Announces Distribution Payment Details
feed.summary: The India Fund, Inc. (NYSE:IFN) announced a distribution payment of $0.45 per share to shareholders of record as of May 30, 2024, payable on July 5, 2024. This distribution will automatically be paid in newly issued shares of the Fund unless shareholders instruct otherwise. The fund also provided estimated sources of the distribution, noting that the final tax determination will be made at year-end.

feed.title: Wix.com Earnings Call: AI Bets Drive Growth
feed.summary: Wix.com's recent earnings call highlighted strong Q4 and full-year growth in revenue and bookings, driven by significant investments in AI-driven products like Base 44 and Wix Harmony. While these investments are causing near-term margin pressure and elevated AI costs, management expressed confidence in their long-term strategy, including a substantial share repurchase program. The company expects continued mid-teens growth in 2026, balancing expansion with controlled profitability despite macro headwinds affecting small and midsize merchants and increased marketing spend.

feed.title: iShares US Medical Devices ETF (NYSE: IHI) - Share Price
feed.summary: This article provides detailed share price information for the iShares US Medical Devices ETF (NYSE: IHI). It lists the current share price, recent movements, and comprehensive historical performance data for various periods, including daily open, high, low, close, and volume. The content is purely factual, focusing on financial metrics without any analytical commentary.

feed.title: SandRidge Energy (SD) Reports Strong Q4 Revenue and Production Growth
feed.summary: SandRidge Energy (SD) announced strong Q4 revenue of $39.4 million and a significant increase in oil production, reaching a multi-year peak. The company plans to continue its development activities in the Cherokee region, focusing on full-cycle returns and operational flexibility while maintaining a strong safety record. Despite a slight revenue decline over three years, SandRidge exhibits robust financial health with strong margins, no debt, and notable institutional ownership.

feed.title: Trane Technologies plc Bonds — Corporate Bond Rates
feed.summary: This article provides a list of Trane Technologies plc corporate bonds, sorted by yield to maturity, to help investors find reliable investment options. It details various bonds issued by Trane Technologies plc and its financing subsidiaries, including their symbols, yield to maturity, volume, price, coupon rates, maturity dates, outstanding amounts, and minimum denominations. The information is presented to cater to investors seeking stability during market volatility.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on CoStar Group: "Another Victim of AI That I Am Very Concerned About"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed concern about CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP), calling it "another victim of AI." The company's stock was down 27.4% in February partly due to fears that AI could easily replicate its proprietary data and analytics for the commercial real estate market, similar to Zillow. Despite a strong fourth-quarter report, CoStar issued a disappointing forecast, with AI worries beginning to impact its numbers.

feed.title: Ionis pharma director Loscalzo sells $82k in shares
feed.summary: Ionis Pharmaceuticals director Joseph Loscalzo sold 1,032 shares of common stock for approximately $82,832 and exercised options to acquire the same number of shares for $39,277. The company, which has a market cap of $12.44 billion, has seen its stock surge 122.7% over the past year despite profitability challenges. Ionis is also advancing with a supplemental New Drug Application for olezarsen and presenting new data on DAWNZERA, while analysts have adjusted price targets based on recent updates and upcoming clinical readouts.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer Stock Price Drops 1.3%
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) saw its stock price fall by 1.3% despite reporting better-than-expected earnings. The decline in share value to $32.24, with 26.8 million shares traded, suggests other market factors are influencing investor sentiment. Analysts have issued varied price targets, with Needham & Company lowering theirs to $40 while Goldman Sachs lifted its target to $27, maintaining a "sell" rating.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Stock Drops 2.8%
feed.summary: Shares of Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) fell 2.8% on Thursday, closing at $153.94, amid a broader market sell-off and analyst adjustments to price targets. This decline highlights challenges in the consumer goods industry from shifting preferences and increased competition. While some analysts upgraded the stock, others downgraded it to a "hold," reflecting mixed sentiments about the company's future performance.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin, RTX Corp Stocks Hit All-Time Highs On Iran Attack: Here's The Congress Members Who Own Shares
feed.summary: Defense stocks, including Lockheed Martin (LMT), RTX Corp (RTX), and Palantir Technologies (PLTR), surged to all-time highs following U.S. attacks against Iran. Several members of Congress are shareholders in these companies, with their recent trading activities being highlighted. This situation raises potential conflict of interest concerns, particularly for those serving on defense-related committees.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Secures $132.92M Contract Modification for F-35 Support
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) has been awarded a $132.92 million contract modification to continue supporting F-35 flight tests, with completion anticipated by March 2027. While the defense contractor shows strong revenue growth, its profitability margins are declining, and its debt-to-equity ratio is high. Investors should consider the company's valuation, market sentiment, and sector-specific risks, including government budget constraints and geopolitical tensions.

feed.title: Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE) Insider Sells $1,816,244.50 in Stock
feed.summary: Expedia Group insider Robert Dzielak sold 8,225 shares of NASDAQ:EXPE stock for $1,816,244.50, reducing his stake by 7.43%. This sale followed the company's strong earnings beat, where Expedia reported higher-than-expected EPS and revenue, leading to a 13.4% stock rally and a dividend increase. Despite the insider sale and a reduced price target from Mizuho, Expedia has seen positive sentiment from market reactions to AI integrations, strategic changes, and partnership announcements.

feed.title: William Lewis Sells 10,699 Shares of Insmed (NASDAQ:INSM) Stock
feed.summary: Insmed CEO William Lewis sold 10,699 shares of the company's stock on March 5, 2026, for approximately $1.56 million, reducing his stake by 3.43%. This sale follows several other insider sales made in early 2026. The company recently missed Q4 EPS estimates, and its stock traded down approximately 4.2% following the filings, despite analysts rating it a "Buy" with a consensus target price of around $207.52.

feed.title: Mani Sundaram Sells 3,186 Shares of Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) Stock
feed.summary: Mani Sundaram, EVP of Akamai Technologies, recently sold 3,186 shares of AKAM stock for approximately $324,653 and an additional 8,642 shares for $875,003, reducing his stake by 13.79%. This comes as Akamai exceeded Q4 revenue and EPS estimates and secured a four-year, $200 million deal to host an NVIDIA GPU cluster, boosting its AI/inference-cloud growth strategy. However, the company faces mixed analyst sentiment, with warnings of increased 2026 capital expenditure and customer concentration risk from the AI deal possibly pressuring near-term margins.

feed.title: IDEXX Laboratories (NASDAQ:IDXX) EVP Sells $1,115,574.06 in Stock
feed.summary: Nimrata Hunt, EVP of IDEXX Laboratories (NASDAQ:IDXX), sold 1,758 shares of company stock for over $1.1 million on March 3rd, reducing her stake by 8.83%. This follows a previous sale of 2,693 shares in February. Shares of IDEXX Laboratories traded down 4.6% on Thursday to $618.92 and the company recently reported Q4 EPS of $2.92, slightly missing analyst estimates.

feed.title: Eric Chewning Sells 1,700 Shares of Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) Stock
feed.summary: Eric Chewning, EVP at Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII), sold 1,700 shares of the company's stock for a total of $736,848, reducing his position by 46.59%. This transaction, disclosed in an SEC filing, occurred on March 4th. The aerospace company's stock experienced a 3.5% drop after the news, despite beating recent quarterly earnings estimates and declaring a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Mortimer Buckley Buys 2,230 Shares of Boeing (NYSE:BA) Stock
feed.summary: Mortimer Buckley, a director at Boeing (NYSE:BA), recently purchased 2,230 shares of the company's stock for approximately $499,966, increasing his total holdings to 4,430 shares. This transaction, disclosed in an SEC filing, occurred on March 3rd at an average price of $224.20 per share. Boeing demonstrated strong quarterly earnings, reporting $9.92 EPS and $23.95 billion in revenue, surpassing analyst estimates, although the stock faces a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with various positive and negative sentiments impacting its outlook.

feed.title: Uber (UBER) Sees Modest Bearish Sentiment Among Option Traders
feed.summary: Uber Technologies Inc (UBER) recently saw a slight dip in its stock price to $75.42, accompanied by an increase in implied volatility, suggesting potential price fluctuations. Options trading showed a modest bearish sentiment with a put/call ratio of 1.2, although the flattening put-call skew indicated a mildly bullish underlying sentiment. Despite these shifts, Uber maintains a strong financial position with significant market presence and a healthy Piotroski F-Score of 7.

feed.title: Layoffs at Campbell's Soup factory near Oklahoma border top 200
feed.summary: Campbell's Co. plans to lay off 205 of its 568 employees at its Paris, Texas factory as it shifts from soup production to making Prego Italian Sauces and Pace salsa. This transition will cease soup operations on May 1, and the repurposed plant will require a smaller workforce. The company has informed employees and those who work until their layoff will receive separation benefits.

feed.title: General Dynamics Corp (GD, US3695501086) in 2026: Defense Cash Flows, Submarine Backlog and Rate Ris
feed.summary: This article analyzes General Dynamics Corp (GD) in 2026, highlighting its position as a core U.S. defense contractor with strong visibility from long-term military and aerospace programs. It examines GD's business segments, including Aerospace, Marine Systems, Combat Systems, and Technologies, discussing their impact on the company's financial performance and strategic position. The analysis also covers macroeconomic factors like interest rates and defense budgets, and key risks such as budget uncertainty and execution challenges, concluding that GD offers stability for investors monitoring these variables.

feed.title: Hewlett Packard to pull out of Boise in 2027
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard, Inc. announced it will cease its Boise operations and exit Idaho by October 31, 2027, impacting approximately 1,100 employees primarily in the LaserJet division. The company's decision aligns with efforts to streamline its real estate footprint and global location strategy. Employees were informed of this transition and will receive more details regarding individual options by May 1.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Trading Down 2.8% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) shares dropped 2.8% due to recent insider selling, including significant sales by the CEO and other insiders, which created short-term selling pressure. Despite this, the company's fundamentals remain resilient with a Q3 EPS beat, slightly below-expected revenue, and an annual dividend. Analyst sentiment is generally positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and several recent target price increases.

feed.title: Amcor Flexibles North America Prices US$1.5 Billion Guaranteed Senior Notes
feed.summary: Amcor Flexibles North America has announced the pricing of US$1.5 billion in guaranteed senior notes through a U.S. capital market debt offering. This includes two tranches of SEC-registered global notes due in 2029 and 2036, which are guaranteed by Amcor plc and several affiliates, and expected to receive investment-grade ratings. The move aims to strengthen Amcor's funding position and demonstrates continued confidence in its strategic initiatives and packaging operations.

feed.title: Cooper Companies raises 2026 profit forecast on demand for disposable contact lenses
feed.summary: Cooper Companies has raised its profit forecast for 2026 due to strong demand for disposable contact lenses. The news was reported by Refinitiv and Reuters, focusing on the company's strategic business performance.

feed.title: Is Hut 8’s AI Data Center Pivot Amid Heavy 2025 Losses Altering The Investment Case For Hut 8 (HUT)?
feed.summary: Hut 8 Corp. reported significant losses in 2025 but announced a strategic pivot towards building AI data center infrastructure through partnerships with Anthropic and Fluidstack. This move aims to diversify revenue away from Bitcoin-linked income and expand its AI/HPC pipeline, though it also introduces execution risks for large-scale projects. The shift seeks to justify its current sales multiple despite ongoing losses, as analyst forecasts vary regarding the success of this capital-intensive strategy.

feed.title: Dycom Industries Reports 2025 Earnings: $5.55B Revenue, Issues 2026 Guidance - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Dycom Industries Inc. has released its fiscal fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. The company reported a quarterly profit of $16.3 million on revenues of $1.46 billion, and an annual profit of $281.2 million with total revenue reaching $5.55 billion. For the upcoming fiscal year, Dycom anticipates full-year revenue to be between $6.85 billion and $7.15 billion.

feed.title: Inuvo 2025 10-K: Revenue $86.2M, EPS not provided; net loss $(5.1)M
feed.summary: Inuvo reported a net revenue of $86.2 million for fiscal year 2025, marking a 2.9% increase year-over-year, alongside a net loss of $5.1 million. The company's gross profit stood at $64.2 million, with a gross margin of 74.5%. Key business highlights include product launches like IntentPath and Ranger to expand AI capabilities, the introduction of IntentKey AI, and the appointment of a new COO to accelerate go-to-market strategies.

feed.title: Chatham Lodging Acquires Six Hilton Properties, Increases Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Chatham Lodging Trust (CLDT) has acquired six Hilton-branded hotels for $92 million, comprising 589 rooms, to enhance its portfolio with newer properties and focus on extended-stay guests. This strategic move aims to improve profit margins and increase adjusted funds from operations by approximately $0.10 per share annually. Reflecting confidence, CLDT also raised its quarterly common dividend by 11% to $0.10 per share.

feed.title: Honda to import China-made EVs to bolster Japanese lineup
feed.summary: Honda Motor is set to become the first Japanese automaker to sell China-made electric vehicles in its domestic market, with sales starting as early as this spring. The initiative aims to offer more EV options to Japanese consumers, beginning with models like the Honda e:NP2. This strategic move highlights increasing integration between Chinese manufacturing and the global automotive market.

feed.title: Downgrading The Trade Desk's Moat to None From Narrow Due to Increasing Competitive Intensity and AI
feed.summary: Morningstar has downgraded The Trade Desk's economic moat from "Narrow" to "None" due to increased competitive intensity in the advertising technology sector and the growing influence of AI. The report highlights that despite TTD's demand-side platform model that avoids conflicts of interest, its lack of direct ad inventory ownership results in a less preferred closed-loop system for advertisers. This downgrade suggests potential challenges for the company's long-term competitive advantages.

feed.title: Prologis (NYSE:PLD) Earns Buy Rating from Analysts at Citigroup
feed.summary: Prologis (NYSE:PLD) received a "Buy" rating and a $145 price target from Citigroup, implying a 5.3% upside. This follows a strong earnings report where Prologis beat revenue estimates and confirmed its FY2026 EPS guidance. Other analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus for the stock, with various target adjustments in recent months.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson units to pay $65 million to settle Tracleer antitrust class action
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson's units have agreed to a $65 million settlement for an antitrust class action related to the drug Tracleer. This information was reported by Reuters, highlighting a legal resolution involving one of the pharmaceutical giant's products. The settlement addresses claims related to alleged anti-competitive practices.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson units to pay $65 million to settle Tracleer antitrust class action
feed.summary: Two Johnson & Johnson units, Actelion Pharmaceuticals and Janssen Research & Development, have agreed to a preliminary $65 million settlement for an antitrust class action. The lawsuit alleged that the drugmakers overcharged for the pulmonary hypertension drug Tracleer by delaying generic competition. The settlement, which requires judicial approval, covers Tracleer purchases across 31 states, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico between December 2015 and September 2024.

feed.title: Equifax credit checks: what changed now and why it matters
feed.summary: Equifax is tightening its credit check processes in the US, impacting how lenders, landlords, and employers assess individuals. The article explains these changes, highlights expert warnings, and provides advice on protecting one's credit score. It delves into the mechanics of Equifax credit checks, their expanding role, and offers a consumer playbook for managing credit reports effectively.

feed.title: JPMorgan’s Co-Head of Shareholder Engagement Porretti Departs
feed.summary: Alfredo Porretti, co-head of shareholder engagement and M&A capital markets at JPMorgan Chase & Co., has reportedly left the bank. His departure was confirmed by sources familiar with the matter, who requested anonymity. Porretti was based in New York.

feed.title: Valero Energy Corporation Announces Pricing of Notes Offering
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corporation announced the pricing of a public offering of $850 million aggregate principal amount of 5.150% Senior Notes due 2036. The offering is expected to close on March 10, 2026, with net proceeds primarily intended for general corporate purposes, including the repayment or redemption of existing debentures and senior notes. SMBC Nikko Securities America, Inc., Citigroup Global Markets Inc., MUFG Securities Americas Inc., and Wells Fargo Securities, LLC are acting as joint book-running managers for the offering.

feed.title: Mosaic (MOS) Maintains Quarterly Dividend at $0.22/Share
feed.summary: Mosaic Company (MOS) has announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.22 per share, resulting in a 3.35% forward yield. Despite plans for a significant $1.5 billion capital expenditure by 2026 to boost phosphate and potash production, the company faces challenges including declining revenue growth and profitability, with its Altman Z-Score indicating potential financial stress. Strategic investments aim for long-term growth, but current financial metrics suggest caution for investors.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) Stock Price Down 1.3% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) experienced a 1.3% decline in its stock price during trading on Thursday, with the stock closing at $32.24 and 26.8 million shares changing hands. The company has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $43.43, following various analyst rating changes and price target adjustments. Super Micro Computer reported strong earnings in its latest quarter, exceeding analyst expectations for EPS and revenue, and institutional investors have recently adjusted their positions in the stock.

feed.title: Paycom Expands Share Repurchase Authorization with Added Funds
feed.summary: Paycom's board has authorized an additional $200 million for its stock repurchase program, following approximately $1.45 billion in buybacks since July 2024. The program, which allows for flexible repurchases and can be suspended at any time, is set to expire on August 15, 2026. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates PAYC as an "Outperform" due to its financial strength, conservative balance sheet, and strong cash generation, despite weak technical momentum.

feed.title: Food City Partners with Coca-Cola to Launch Sprite Cherry in Stores
feed.summary: Food City, in partnership with Coca-Cola Consolidated and The Coca-Cola Company, is launching an exclusive Sprite Cherry beverage. This new flavor will be available only at Food City locations through September 2026, offering customers a refreshing option for spring and summer. Both companies expressed enthusiasm for the collaboration and the new product's introduction.`

feed.title: RAM Mounts Partners with Tyler Technologies to Support Smarter, More Durable Onboard Student Transportation Technology
feed.summary: RAM Mounts has partnered with Tyler Technologies to provide more durable and reliable onboard technology for student transportation. This collaboration combines Tyler Technologies' student transportation software with RAM Mounts' rugged mounting solutions, ensuring that devices like Samsung enterprise-grade tablets perform reliably in demanding school bus environments. The partnership aims to enhance safety, efficiency, and scalability for school districts by providing secure, adjustable, and vibration-damping mounting options for mobile devices.

feed.title: VICI Properties Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.45 a Share, Payable April 9 to Holders of Record March 19
feed.summary: VICI Properties will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.45 per share. The dividend is payable on April 9, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 19, 2026. This announcement follows several recent analyst adjustments to VICI Properties' price target.

feed.title: VICI Properties (VICI) Maintains Quarterly Dividend, Offers Stro
feed.summary: VICI Properties (VICI) has announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.45 per share, resulting in a 6.06% forward yield. The company is strategically targeting $2.625 billion in adjusted funds from operations by 2026 and is diversifying its portfolio within the REIT sector. Despite its strong financial health and positive analyst sentiment, VICI's Altman Z-Score suggests some financial stress, and its debt issuance strategy warrants monitoring.

feed.title: Equinix Issues $1.5 Billion in New Senior Notes
feed.summary: Equinix's Singapore and European financing subsidiaries issued $1.5 billion in senior unsecured notes on March 5, 2026, comprising $700 million at 4.400% due 2031 and $800 million at 4.700% due 2033. Cross-currency swaps were utilized to lower effective interest rates and manage multi-currency funding risks for the company. An AI Analyst from TipRanks rates EQIX as "Outperform" due to strong operating performance and a positive 2026 outlook, despite valuation and financial risk concerns.

feed.title: T Stamp Completes Lexverify Acquisition to Expand AI Capabilities
feed.summary: T Stamp, Inc. (IDAI) has completed the acquisition of U.K.-based Lexverify Ltd., an all-stock transaction aimed at expanding T Stamp's expertise in large language models and strengthening its access to the U.K. market. The acquisition involves safeguards such as non-compete clauses and commitments to maintain employee terms, with the purchase price paid in four tranches of Class A common stock. Despite the acquisition, TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates IDAI as "Neutral" due to weak financial performance and bearish technicals, although corporate updates could provide upside catalysts.

feed.title: Medtronic announces cash dividend for fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026
feed.summary: Medtronic plc announced a cash dividend of $0.71 per ordinary share for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026, consistent with an increase announced in May 2025. The company, which is part of the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats, has increased its annual dividend for 48 consecutive years. The dividend is payable on April 17, 2026, to shareholders of record by March 27, 2026.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Hercules Capital, Inc. - HTGC
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating Hercules Capital, Inc. (NYSE: HTGC) after a short report by Hunterbrook Media alleged the company marks software debt at 100 cents on the dollar despite industry distress, and that a significant portion of its reported income comes from payment-in-kind loans. Following the report, Hercules's stock price dropped by 7.91%. Investors harmed by potential securities fraud or unlawful business practices are advised to contact the firm.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Gartner, Inc. - IT
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) on behalf of its investors. This investigation follows Gartner's Q4 2025 financial results and 2026 outlook, where it projected revenue and adjusted earnings below analyst expectations. Following this announcement, Gartner's stock price declined significantly.
